title: Cherry Garden Leaves
description: From the Pale Garden to the Cherry Grove
body:
From the Pale Garden to the Cherry Grove.

Hi!

I´m back with a very small resource pack just to let you know I´m still alive.

I really liked the leaves particles in the Pale Garden so I made them pink and now they are part of the Cherry Grove.

This pack is for Java Edition. No need to unzip.

Lemme know if you have any suggestion or ideas for future texture packs. (You can reach me at Planet Minecraft: [valesde_valley](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/valesde_valley/))

That´s it. I hope you like it! (:
